tools.name: getMessageStatus
tools.description: Retrieves the current processing status of a CPI message by its message ID. Use this when the user asks about the status, result or outcome of a specific message or transaction.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique message ID of the CPI message

tools.name: getMessageLog
tools.description: Retrieves the detailed step by step processing log for a CPI message. Use this when the user asks for logs, execution trace or processing details.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique message ID of the CPI message

tools.name: deployArtifact
tools.description: Deploys an integration artifact (iFlow) on the CPI tenant. Use this when the user asks to deploy, start, activate or publish an integration artifact.

parameters.name: artifactId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the CPI integration artifact to deploy

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Version of the artifact to deploy, defaults to active

tools.name: undeployArtifact
tools.description: Undeploys a running integration artifact on the CPI tenant. Use this when the user asks to undeploy, stop or deactivate an integration artifact.

parameters.name: artifactId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the CPI integration artifact to undeploy

tools.name: listArtifacts
tools.description: Lists all deployed integration artifacts on the CPI tenant. Use when user asks to show, list or get all deployed artifacts.

tools.name: getIFlowConfigurations
tools.description: Get all externalized configuration parameters (key/value pairs) of an integration flow by its ID and version. Use this when the user wants to see, inspect, or list the configuration parameters of an iFlow.

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: The ID of the integration flow artifact

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: Version of the artifact. Use 'active' for the current deployed version.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional OData filter e.g. substringof('Receiver_',ParameterKey) eq true

tools.name: getIFlowConfigurationCount
tools.description: Get the total number of configuration parameters for an integration flow. Use this when the user asks how many parameters an iFlow has configured.

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: The ID of the integration flow artifact

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: Version of the artifact. Use 'active' for the current deployed version.

tools.name: updateIFlowConfiguration
tools.description: Update the value of a specific configuration parameter of an integration flow. Use this when the user wants to change or set a config parameter value. This is a write operation — always confirm the artifact ID, parameter key, and new value with the user before executing. Do not deploy the artifact. In response do mention that user needs to deploy artifact via separate request unless mentioned explicitely.

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: The ID of the integration flow artifact

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: Version of the artifact. Use 'active' for current deployed version.

parameters.name: ParameterKey
parameters.description: The key of the configuration parameter to update e.g. Receiver_Address

parameters.name: ParameterValue
parameters.description: The new value to set for the parameter
